name: Pistachio Fluff
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together cracker crumbs and melted margarine. Pat the mixture into a 9x13 pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes; cool completely.
3. In a separate bowl, blend together the dry pudding mix, milk, and ice cream until smooth.
4. Pour the pudding mixture over the cooled crust.
5. Refrigerate until firm, but do not freeze.
6. Before serving, cover with Cool Whip.
7. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
8. Cut into squares.
NOTE: You can use any flavor of instant pudding desired.
